provider_unavailable_reason: EXA_API_KEY is unavailable in the resumed environment; the configured Brave backend supplied the bounded fallback.
query: Recent first-person customer discussions about Auralo Pheromone Perfume or women's multicoloured tweed statement trousers. Find exact buyer questions, objections, and purchase wording for retrieved_customer_voice. Exclude seller copy, affiliate promotions, and unrelated products.

items.title: Aura Fragrance Reviews | Read Customer Service Reviews of www.aurafragrance.com
items.text: I recently purchased Governor’s Island by Bond No. 9 from Aura Perfume (Order #655205), and this has been a frustrating experience. The fragrance I received is extremely weak—honestly, it smells more like alcohol than an actual perfume. There’s little to no projection, and the scent barely lasts.
